testcase.name: leaseRejectedWhenPoolDraining

testcase.name: shutdownClosesAllProducers
testcase.system-out: 04:17:31.384 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Initialising TransactionalProducerPool size=2 minHealthy=1 04:17:31.384 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Initialising transactions for producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.385 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer ready transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.387 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Initialising transactions for producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.387 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer ready transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.387 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool initialised healthy=2 total=2 state=HEALTHY 04:17:31.387 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool draining — waiting up to 1000ms for in-flight leases 04:17:31.387 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.388 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.388 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool stopped 04:17:31.391 [main] WARN com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- shutdown() called in unexpected pool state STOPPED 04:17:31.391 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool draining — waiting up to 1000ms for in-flight leases 04:17:31.391 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.391 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.392 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool stopped

testcase.name: fatalFencingEvictsProducerAndTriggersRecovery
testcase.system-out: 04:17:31.398 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Initialising TransactionalProducerPool size=2 minHealthy=1 04:17:31.398 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Initialising transactions for producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.398 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer ready transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.398 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Initialising transactions for producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.399 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer ready transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.399 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool initialised healthy=2 total=2 state=HEALTHY 04:17:31.400 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer state forced transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 READY → LEASED 04:17:31.401 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Lease acquired leaseId=eab80e7d-61be-44da-a234-b6c47273d2c9 transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 waited=0ms 04:17:31.401 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- executeInTransaction leaseId=eab80e7d-61be-44da-a234-b6c47273d2c9 transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 correlationId=null 04:17:31.401 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- beginTransaction transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.401 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Transaction begun leaseId=eab80e7d-61be-44da-a234-b6c47273d2c9 transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.402 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- flush transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.402 [main] WARN com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Transaction error attempt=1/3 leaseId=eab80e7d-61be-44da-a234-b6c47273d2c9 transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 errorClass=FATAL error=fenced 04:17:31.402 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- abortTransaction transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.402 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Transaction aborted leaseId=eab80e7d-61be-44da-a234-b6c47273d2c9 04:17:31.402 [main] ERROR com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Evicting producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 leaseId=eab80e7d-61be-44da-a234-b6c47273d2c9 04:17:31.402 [main] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer state forced transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 LEASED → RECOVERING 04:17:31.402 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.403 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.RecoverySupervisor -- Scheduling recovery for transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 slot=0 04:17:31.404 [kafka-pool-recovery] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Initialising transactions for producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.405 [kafka-pool-recovery] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer ready transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.405 [kafka-pool-recovery] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.RecoverySupervisor -- Recovery succeeded transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.405 [kafka-pool-recovery] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Producer returned to pool transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.606 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool draining — waiting up to 1000ms for in-flight leases 04:17:31.607 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-1 04:17:31.607 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Closing producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.608 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Pool stopped

testcase.name: poolFailsFastWhenInitTransactionsAlwaysFails
testcase.system-out: 04:17:31.612 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Initialising TransactionalProducerPool size=2 minHealthy=1 04:17:31.612 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Initialising transactions for producer transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 04:17:31.612 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer ready testcase.name: concurrentLeasesAreExclusive
testcase.system-out: 04:17:32.145 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool -- Initialising TransactionalProducerPool size=2 minHealthy=1 04:17:32.145 [main] INFO com.kafka.producer.pool.PooledProducer -- Producer state forced transactionalId=test-svc-inst-0-0 LEASED → READY 04:17:32.158 [pool-2-thread-1] DEBUG com.kafka.producer.pool.TransactionalProducerPool
